allow: Bash(pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode acl_latex.tex > /tmp/compile3.log 2>&1 && echo "=== First pass completed ===" && bibtex acl_latex > /tmp/bibtex.log 2>&1 && echo "=== Bibtex completed ===" && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode acl_latex.tex > /tmp/compile4.log 2>&1 && echo "=== Second pass completed ===" && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode acl_latex.tex > /tmp/compile5.log 2>&1 && echo "=== Final pass completed ===" && ls -lh acl_latex.pdf)

chore: clean up repository for GitHub release

- Remove temporary files \(venv, __pycache__, logs, *.log\)
- Remove runtime directories \(model_run_time/, submission/, arxiv_submission/\)
- Remove LaTeX temporary files \(*.aux, *.blg, *.bbl, *.out, *.fdb_latexmk\)
- Add requirements.txt for project dependencies
- Add MIT LICENSE for open source distribution
- Improve .gitignore with comprehensive rules
- Setup Git LFS for paper_data/ directory
- Add paper/AUTO_REVIEW.md for review tracking

This cleanup reduces repository size by ~3GB and prepares the project
for public GitHub release.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

- Create agents/ directory and move agent scripts:
